reasoning: As of the knowledge cutoff date in early November 2025 (specifically around November 7), gold prices are hovering around $4,000 per ounce, strongly supported by ongoing macroeconomic, geopolitical, and structural factors that have propelled gold on a massive rally in 2025 from $2,800 to over $4,000.
